use_cases: Tech startup landing pages seeking a futuristic cyberpunk aesthetic
Developer tools and SaaS product marketing hero sections
Gaming platforms and entertainment site headers
Creative agency portfolios with matrix-style visual effects
Cybersecurity and tech company landing pages
ai_summary: An interactive cyberpunk hero component featuring a matrix-style grid with falling character animations and glitch effects on tile click. The dark-themed hero uses neon accents and dynamic character randomization to create an immersive futuristic landing page experience for tech-forward brands.
